content.body:
v0.7 carried a redundant user.mode field that served the same purpose as the
new communication.mode introduced in #66. Keeping both invited drift. This
commit removes user.mode and default_profile from UserConfig entirely.

- UserConfig: now only Language + Autonomy
- runtime.UserConfig: drops Mode (CommunicationMode is the single source)
- Migration path: legacy user.mode maps exclusively to communication.mode
- All tests updated; no dual-field references remain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: refactor(config): collapse user.mode and default_profile into communication.mode
